default_body.markdown:
## Updates:
- Synced translations from the [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Download:
  - Reduced the notification priority of the JVM runtime service
  - Added progress and description to notifications during Forge-like installer installation

## Fixes:
- LWJGL:
  - Fixed Vulkan Mod failing to run due to missing UNSAFE
  - Fixed Minecraft 1.7.2 failing to launch properly
  - Fixed critical LWJGL-OpenGL mapping errors
  - Fixed certain versions of JourneyMap preventing the game from launching (rendering issues may still persist)

bodies.markdown:
## 更新：
- 同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- 下载：
  - 降低 JVM 运行服务通知级别
  - 为 Forge 类安装器安装过程的通知添加进度和描述


## 修复：
- LWJGL：
  - Vulkan Mod 因为缺少 UNSAFE 无法运行
  - 1.7.2 无法正常启动
  - 严重的 LWJGL-OpenGL 映射错误
  - 部分版本 JourneyMap 导致游戏无法启动（但仍有渲染错误）
